title: Head & meta essentials
description: The invisible tags that make things behave.

questions.prompt: Which meta tag makes a page scale correctly on mobile?
questions.explanation: The viewport meta tells mobile browsers to lay out at device width, not a fake 980px canvas.

questions.prompt: Which meta tag declares the character encoding?
questions.explanation: Always <meta charset="utf-8"> as early as possible in <head>.

questions.prompt: Where do <link rel="stylesheet"> and <script src="..."> go?
questions.explanation: Stylesheet in head for CSSOM. Scripts often go at the end of body or use defer/async.
